title: Ubique
content:
آ آ آ آ There is a word you often see, pronounce it as you may
آ آ آ آ ï؟½You bike,ï؟½ ï؟½you bykwee,ï؟½ ï؟½ubbikwe ï؟½, alludinï؟½ to R.A.
آ آ آ آ It serves ï؟½Orse, Field, anï؟½ Garrison as motto for a crest,
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ when youï؟½ve found out all it means Iï؟½ll tell you ï؟½alf the rest.

آ آ آ آ Ubique means the long-range Krupp beï؟½ind the low-range ï؟½ill,
آ آ آ آ Ubique means youï؟½ll pick it up anï؟½, while you do, stand still.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means youï؟½ve caught the flash anï؟½ timed it by the sound.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means five gunnersï؟½ ï؟½ash before youï؟½ve loosed a round.

آ آ آ آ Ubique means Blue Fuse anï؟½ make the ï؟½ole to sink the trail.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means stand up anï؟½ take the Mauserï؟½s ï؟½alf-mile ï؟½ail.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means the crazy team not God nor man can ï؟½old.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means that ï؟½orseï؟½s scream which turns your innards cold!

آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½Bank, ï؟½Olborn, Bank, a penny all the way,
آ آ آ آ The soothinï؟½, jingle-bump-anï؟½-clank from day to peaceful day.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½Theyï؟½ve caught De Wet, anï؟½ now we shaï؟½n t be long.ï؟½
آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½I much regret, the beggarï؟½s goinï؟½ strong!ï؟½

آ آ آ آ Ubique means the tearinï؟½ drift where, breech-blocks jammed with mud,
آ آ آ آ The khaki muzzles duck anï؟½ lift across the khaki flood.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means the dancing plain that changes rocks to Boers.
آ آ آ آ Ubique means the mirage again anï؟½ shellinï؟½ all outdoors.

آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½Entrain at once for Grootdefeatfonteinï؟½!
آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½Off-load your gunsï؟½, at midnight in the rain!
آ آ آ آ Ubique means ï؟½More mounted men. Return all guns to store.ï؟½
آ آ آ آ Ubique means the R. A. M. R. Infantillery Corps!

آ آ آ آ Ubique means that warninï؟½ grunt the perished linesman knows,
آ آ آ آ When oï؟½er ï؟½is strung anï؟½ sufferinï؟½ front the shrapnel sprays ï؟½is foes;
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ as their firinï؟½ dies away the ï؟½usky whisper runs
آ آ آ آ From lips that ï؟½ave nï؟½t drunk all day: ï؟½The Guns! Thank Gawd, the Guns!ï؟½

آ آ آ آ Extreme, depressed, point-blank or short, end-first or anyï؟½ow,
آ آ آ آ From Colesberg Kop to Quaggaï؟½s Poort, from Ninety-Nine till now,
آ آ آ آ By what Iï؟½ve ï؟½eard the others tell anï؟½ I in spots ï؟½ave seen,
آ آ آ آ Thereï؟½s nothinï؟½ this side ï؟½Eaven or ï؟½Ell Ubique does nï؟½t mean!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Rudyard Kipling represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Rudyard Kipling's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
